name: Open WebUI
short_desc: Self-hosted AI chat UI for Ollama and OpenAI-compatible LLM APIs.
author: Open WebUI
description: Open WebUI is an extensible, self-hosted AI interface that works with Ollama and any OpenAI-compatible API. It offers chat, RAG, model management and a plugin system. Point it at your own LLM backend after install. Data persists under the app data directory.
